headline: North America Building Envelope Tapes Market Forecast Report 2026-2031, Profiles of Prominent Vendors - 3M, Avery Dennison, DuPont, Henkel, Sika
summary: The North America building envelope tapes market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.18% from 2025 to 2031, driven by a shift toward high-performance air and weather barrier tapes. This trend is moving the industry away from generic products toward advanced solutions that enhance structural durability. The adoption of advanced acrylic and hybrid chemistries is central, offering superior environmental resistance and bond stability over traditional adhesives. Stringent energy efficiency regulation
